Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 1, 087 [Omens or hemerology][via cams/gkab]

flake
flakeflake NaN  (start of surface missing)
flake 1'flake 1'

[...] x [...]

[...] ... [...]

flake 2'2'

[...] x BI GANBA x [...]

[...] ... business ... [...]

flake 3'3'

[...] ⸢EREN₂?⸣ ZI

[...] the army will attack.

flake 4'4'

[...] x U₄-MEŠ

[...] ... days

flake 5'5'

[...]-MEŠ la₃ AL.TIL

[...] ... not completed.

flake 6'6'

[...]-⸢KAM₂?⸣ ŠU LUGAL KURad

[...] the king (lit. the king's hand) will conquer ....

flake 7'7'

[...] 9v-KAM₂ KI.MIN DI BI NU SI.SA₂

[...] on the 9th [...] ditto: that lawsuit will not go well.

flake 8'8'

[...] U₄ 19v-KAM₂ KI.MIN KI.MIN<(DI)> BI NU SI.SA₂

[...] on the 19th day ditto: ditto (that lawsuit will not go well).

flake 9'9'

[...] x U₄ ina U₄ 21-KAM₂ KI.MIN KI.MIN<(DI)> BI NU SI.SA₂

[...] ... on the 21st day ditto: ditto (that lawsuit will not go well).

flake 10'10'

[...] U₄ 29-KAM₂ KI.MIN KI.MIN<(DI)> BI NU SI.SA₂

[...] on the 29th day ditto: ditto (that lawsuit will not go well).

flake 11'11'

[...] U₄ 30-KAM₂ KI.MIN KI.MIN<(DI)> BI NU SI.SA₂

[...] on the 30st day ditto: ditto (that lawsuit will not go well).

flake 12'12'

[... U₄].DA.GID₂.DA KI.MIN KI.MIN<(DI)> BI NU SI.SA₂

[...] on the omitted day ditto: ditto (that lawsuit will not go well).

flake 13'13'

[...] x LUGAL iz-ziz1

[...] the king will triumph ....

flake 14'14'

[...] x IR ina MU 1-KAM₂ TIuṭ E₂ BI BIRaḫ

[...] ... he will live for 1 year; that household will be scattered.

flake 15'15'

[...] ḪU KI.MIN<(ina)> MU 1-KAM₂ TIuṭ dUTU GUBiz

[...] ... ditto (he will live for 1 year?); Šamaš will triumph.

(rest of surface missing)

1the spelling for izuzzu is unusual; it should be present izzaz instead of preterite; I left it this way because the scribe made the same mistake twice (l. 15').
